phrases.intent_en: Ask if tasting samples are available now
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿hay muestras para probar disponibles ahora?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿EYE MWEHS-trahs PAH-rah proh-BAHR dee-poh-NEE-bles ah-OH-rah?

likely_response.local: Sí, hay muestras en el mostrador.
likely_response.pronunciation: SÍ AHY moo-EH-strahs EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, there are samples at the counter.

responses.english: Yes, there are samples at the counter.
responses.phonetic: SÍ AHY moo-EH-strahs EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR
responses.french: Sí, hay muestras en el mostrador.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to order custom marzipan figures
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo puedo pedir figuras de mazapán personalizadas?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, KOH-moh PWEH-doh peh-DEER fee-GOO-rahs deh mah-thah-PAHN pehr-soh-nah-lee-SAH-dahs

likely_response.local: Rellene este formulario y pague en caja.
likely_response.pronunciation: rehl-LEH-neh EH-steh fohr-moo-lah-REE-oh Y pah-G-eh EHN KAH-hah
likely_response.translation_en: Fill out this form and pay at the register.

responses.english: Fill out this form and pay at the register.
responses.phonetic: rehl-LEH-neh EH-steh fohr-moo-lah-REE-oh Y pah-G-eh EHN KAH-hah
responses.french: Rellene este formulario y pague en caja.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the shelf-stable marzipan is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está el mazapán para llevar de viaje?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-deh es-TAH el mah-sah-PAHN poh-rah yeh-VAHR deh BYAH-heh?

likely_response.local: Junto a la caja, estante azul.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LAH KAH-hah eh-STAHN-teh ah-THOOL
likely_response.translation_en: On the shelves near the exit.

responses.english: On the shelves near the exit.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LAH KAH-hah eh-STAHN-teh ah-THOOL
responses.french: Junto a la caja, estante azul.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the gift packaging counter is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está el mostrador de envoltorio para regalos?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-ahs, DON-deh eh-STAH el mohs-trah-DOHR deh em-bohl-TOH-ree-oh PAH-rah reh-GAH-lohs?

likely_response.local: Junto al expositor de mazapanes, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AHL ehks-poh-see-TOHR DEH mah-thah-PAH-nehs AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the back of the shop, on the left.

responses.english: At the back of the shop, on the left.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AHL ehks-poh-see-TOHR DEH mah-thah-PAH-nehs AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: Junto al expositor de mazapanes, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the traditional almond marzipan is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está el mazapán tradicional de almendra?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh es-TAH el mah-sah-PAHN trah-dee-see-oh-NAHL deh ahl-MEN-drah?

likely_response.local: En la vitrina principal, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH beet-REE-nah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: In the main display case, on the right.

responses.english: In the main display case, on the right.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH beet-REE-nah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: En la vitrina principal, a la derecha.
